id.description: Unique machine identifier for the project type (lowercase letters, digits, hyphen, underscore).

name.description: Human-friendly project type name shown in the UI.

description.description: Optional longer description explaining the project type's intent and usage.

folders.description: An ordered list of folder definitions that will be created for projects of this type.

items.description: Definition of a single folder (name, special flag, and any default resources).

name.description: Folder name (must be unique within this array).

special.description: Marks that the folder has special application-level semantics (e.g. the Workspace).

defaultResources.description: Optional resources to pre-populate inside this folder when a new project is created.

template.description: Optional template content or template id to seed the resource.

contains.description: Enforces that at least one folder object in the array matches the given schema (used here to require a Workspace folder).

name.description: Exact folder name required to satisfy this constraint.

editorConfig.description: Default editor configuration for projects of this type.

body.description: Default body text styles applied to paragraphs.

fontFamily.description: CSS font-family value for body text. e.g. "IBM Plex Serif"

fontSize.description: CSS font-size for body text. e.g. "15px"

lineHeight.description: CSS line-height for body text. Unitless multipliers recommended. Minimum 1.8. e.g. "1.8"

paragraphSpacing.description: CSS margin applied above and below each paragraph. e.g. "16px" or "1em"

fontSize.description: CSS font-size for the heading. e.g. "32px"

fontFamily.description: CSS font-family for the heading. e.g. "IBM Plex Serif"

fontWeight.description: CSS font-weight for the heading. e.g. "400" or "700"

letterSpacing.description: CSS letter-spacing for the heading. Em units recommended. e.g. "0.05em"

color.description: CSS color for the heading. Hex values only. Note: hard-coding a color bypasses the theme-aware ink token and will not respond to light/dark mode.
